title: arenaria suffrutescens
intro: Arenaria suffrutescens, also known as rock jasmine, is a flowering plant that grows in the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of rock jasmine include its ability to soothe and calm the mind and body, reducing stress and anxiety. Arenaria suffrutescens is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
